page_content:
ARTH496 Methods of Art History and Archaeology (3 Credits)

Methods of research and criticism applied to typical art-historical/ archaeological problems, familiarizing the student with bibliography

and other research tools. Introduction to the historiography of art

history and archaeology, surveying the principal theories, encouraging methodological debates within the discipline. Course for majors who intend to go on to graduate school.

Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Art History & Archaeology department. Restriction: Must be in Art History program.
